mapper.sql: a.appointment_id AS "appointmentId", a.tenant_id AS "tenantId", a.project_id AS "projectId", a.work_order_id AS "workOrderId", a.task_id AS "taskId", a.appointment_type AS "appointmentType", a.status, a.assigned_network_id AS "assignedNetworkId", a.technician_id AS "technicianId", a.aggregate_version AS "aggregateVersion", a.current_revision_no AS "currentRevisionNo", a.created_at AS "appointmentCreatedAt", a.created_by AS "appointmentCreatedBy", r.revision_id AS "revisionId", r.revision_no AS "revisionNo", r.previous_revision_id AS "previousRevisionId", r.window_start AS "windowStart", r.window_end AS "windowEnd", r.timezone, r.estimated_duration_minutes AS "estimatedDurationMinutes", r.address_ref AS "addressRef", r.address_version AS "addressVersion", r.confirmed_party_type AS "confirmedPartyType", r.confirmed_party_ref AS "confirmedPartyRef", r.confirmation_channel AS "confirmationChannel", r.confirmed_at AS "confirmedAt", r.reason_code AS "reasonCode", r.note, r.created_by AS "revisionCreatedBy", r.created_at AS "revisionCreatedAt"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM apt_appointment a JOIN apt_appointment_revision r ON r.revision_id = a.current_revision_id WHERE a.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND a.appointment_id = #{appointmentId}

SELECT FROM apt_appointment a JOIN apt_appointment_revision r ON r.revision_id = a.current_revision_id WHERE a.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND a.task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY a.created_at, a.appointment_id

SELECT revision_id AS "revisionId", revision_no AS "revisionNo", previous_revision_id AS "previousRevisionId", window_start AS "windowStart", window_end AS "windowEnd", timezone, estimated_duration_minutes AS "estimatedDurationMinutes", address_ref AS "addressRef", address_version AS "addressVersion", confirmed_party_type AS "confirmedPartyType", confirmed_party_ref AS "confirmedPartyRef", confirmation_channel AS "confirmationChannel", confirmed_at AS "confirmedAt", reason_code AS "reasonCode", note, created_by AS "revisionCreatedBy", created_at AS "revisionCreatedAt" FROM apt_appointment_revision WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND appointment_id = #{appointmentId} ORDER BY revision_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO apt_appointment_revision ( revision_id, tenant_id, appointment_id, revision_no, previous_revision_id, window_start, window_end, timezone, estimated_duration_minutes, address_ref, address_version, confirmed_party_type, confirmed_party_ref, confirmation_channel, confirmed_at, reason_code, note, created_by, created_at ) VALUES ( #{revisionId}, #{tenantId}, #{appointmentId}, #{revisionNo}, #{previousRevisionId}, #{windowStart}, #{windowEnd}, #{timezone}, #{estimatedDurationMinutes}, #{addressRef}, #{addressVersion}, #{confirmedPartyType}, #{confirmedPartyRef}, #{confirmationChannel}, #{confirmedAt}, #{reasonCode}, #{note}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt} )
